text.text:
*Summary*
Issues found: 8 (Critical: 1, Moderate: 3, Trivial: 3, Noise: 1) • Tickets created: 2 new • 0 duplicates skipped • 5 auto-resolved (not ticketed) • 1 consolidated (FORMORIA-1C → DEV-973)
Incident mode: No

*Auto-Resolved (5):*
- :white_check_mark: *ReferenceError: isOwnerOf is not defined* (FORMORIA-3N) — `isOwnerOf` import present in `page.tsx:5`; Turbopack HMR transient in dev mode
- :white_check_mark: *ReferenceError: isOwnerOf is not defined* (FORMORIA-3M) — client-side RSC echo of FORMORIA-3N; same Turbopack HMR root cause
- :white_check_mark: *ReferenceError: isOwner is not defined* (FORMORIA-3P) — `isOwner` is a destructured prop in `InlineVerification`; HMR transient, prop context briefly lost during refresh
- :white_check_mark: *Hydration Error* (FORMORIA-3D) — stale client JS serving old circular-SVG `ProfileCompletenessCard`; code replaced with text-based layout in current codebase
- :white_check_mark: *Hydration failed — server/client HTML mismatch* (FORMORIA-13) — `ProfileCompletenessCard` SVG removed from codebase; recurring event is stale-cache artifact from old client bundle

:red_circle: *<https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-1B|column brands.blurb does not exist>*
Events: 228 server + 27 client · Recurring (since 2026-06-18) · Severity: *Critical*
Audit Supabase `brands` table schema and any views/RPC for a stale `blurb` column reference; also check `.next/` build artifacts. FORMORIA-1C is the client-side echo of this same error.
Ticket: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-973/fix-column-brandsblurb-does-not-exist-error-crashing-home-page|DEV-973> — Fix `column brands.blurb does not exist` error crashing home page · Priority: Urgent · Labels: Bug, L

:large_yellow_circle: *<https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-M|DraftBanner missing from React Client Manifest on brand edit page>*
Events: 4 · Recurring (regressed, since 2026-06-09) · Severity: *Moderate*
Investigate Turbopack HMR Client Manifest registration for `draft-banner.tsx`; file and `'use client'` directive are present but bundler occasionally drops it from the manifest.
Ticket: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-974/fix-draftbanner-missing-from-react-client-manifest-on-brand-edit-page|DEV-974> — Fix DraftBanner missing from React Client Manifest on brand edit page · Priority: High · Labels: Bug, M

*Tickets Created (2):*
- <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-973/fix-column-brandsblurb-does-not-exist-error-crashing-home-page|DEV-973> — Fix `column brands.blurb does not exist` error crashing home page (Priority: Urgent, Bug, L)
- <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-974/fix-draftbanner-missing-from-react-client-manifest-on-brand-edit-page|DEV-974> — Fix DraftBanner missing from React Client Manifest on brand edit page (Priority: High, Bug, M)

Skipped 0 duplicates · 5 issues auto-resolved (not ticketed) · 1 consolidated (FORMORIA-1C → DEV-973)
